overview:
IOBluetoothDeviceInquiryDelegate  deviceInquiryDeviceFound(_:device:) Instance MethoddeviceInquiryDeviceFound(_:device:)macOSoptional func deviceInquiryDeviceFound(
    _ sender: IOBluetoothDeviceInquiry!,
    device: IOBluetoothDevice!
) Parameters senderInquiry object that sent this delegate message.

IOBluetoothDevice that was found.

A new device has been found. You do not need to retain the device - it will be held in the internal storage of the inquiry, and can be accessed later using -foundDevices.

# deviceInquiryDeviceFound(_:device:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ IOBluetooth ](/documentation/iobluetooth)

- [ IOBluetoothDeviceInquiryDelegate ](/documentation/iobluetooth/iobluetoothdeviceinquirydelegate)

- [ deviceInquiryDeviceFound(_:device:) ](/documentation/IOBluetooth/IOBluetoothDeviceInquiryDelegate/deviceInquiryDeviceFound(_:device:))

-  deviceInquiryDeviceFound(_:device:) 

Instance Method# deviceInquiryDeviceFound(_:device:)

macOS

```
optional func deviceInquiryDeviceFound(
    _ sender: IOBluetoothDeviceInquiry!,
    device: IOBluetoothDevice!
)
```

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/IOBluetooth/IOBluetoothDeviceInquiryDelegate/deviceInquiryDeviceFound(_:device:)#parameters)

`sender`Inquiry object that sent this delegate message.

`device`IOBluetoothDevice that was found.

## [Discussion](/documentation/IOBluetooth/IOBluetoothDeviceInquiryDelegate/deviceInquiryDeviceFound(_:device:)#Discussion)

A new device has been found. You do not need to retain the device - it will be held in the internal storage of the inquiry, and can be accessed later using -foundDevices.
